channel.title: Android on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Android on Arrans github.io

item.title: rustdesk/rustdesk
item.description: An open-source remote desktop application designed for self-hosting, as an alternative to TeamViewer.

item.title: laurent22/joplin
item.description: Joplin - the privacy-focused note taking app with sync capabilities for Windows, macOS, Linux, Android and iOS.

item.title: DioxusLabs/dioxus
item.description: Fullstack app framework for web, desktop, and mobile.

item.title: dessalines/thumb-key
item.description: A privacy-conscious Android keyboard made for your thumbs

item.title: termux/termux-packages
item.description: A package build system for Termux.

item.title: sxyazi/yazi
item.description: 💥 Blazing fast terminal file manager written in Rust, based on async I/O.

item.title: AndroidIDEOfficial/AndroidIDE
item.description: AndroidIDE is an IDE for Android to develop full featured Android apps.

item.title: ReVanced/revanced-manager
item.description: 💊 Application to use ReVanced on Android

item.title: jarun/nnn
item.description: n³ The unorthodox terminal file manager

item.title: KRTirtho/spotube
item.description: 🎧 Open source music streaming app! Available for both desktop & mobile!

item.title: ente-io/ente
item.description: 💚 End-to-end encrypted cloud for everything.

item.title: k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx
item.description: Speech-to-text, text-to-speech, speaker diarization, speech enhancement, source separation, and VAD using next-gen Kaldi with onnxruntime without Internet connection. Support embedded systems, Android, iOS, HarmonyOS, Raspberry Pi, RISC-V, RK NPU, Axera NPU, Ascend NPU, x86_64 servers, websocket server/client, support 12 programming languages

item.title: alphacep/vosk-api
item.description: Offline speech recognition API for Android, iOS, Raspberry Pi and servers with Python, Java, C# and Node

item.title: berty/berty
item.description: Berty is a secure peer-to-peer messaging app that works with or without internet access, cellular data or trust in the network

item.title: GopeedLab/gopeed
item.description: A fast, modern download manager for HTTP, BitTorrent, Magnet, and ed2k. Cross-platform, built with Golang and Flutter.

item.title: brandonp2412/Flexify
item.description: 💪 Track your gym progress and flex on people

item.title: Solido/awesome-flutter
item.description: An awesome list that curates the best Flutter libraries, tools, tutorials, articles and more.

item.title: lollipopkit/flutter_server_box
item.description: ServerBox - server status & toolbox

item.title: tasks/tasks
item.description: Bringing Astrid Tasks back from the dead

item.title: beemdevelopment/Aegis
item.description: A free, secure and open source app for Android to manage your 2-step verification tokens.

item.title: ligi/SurvivalManual
item.description: Libre Survival Manual for Android with offline in mind

item.title: isar/isar
item.description: Extremely fast, easy to use, and fully async NoSQL database for Flutter

item.title: FossifyOrg/Calendar
item.description: A simple calendar with events, customizable widgets and no ads.

item.title: Mobile-Artificial-Intelligence/maid
item.description: Maid is a free and open source application for interfacing with llama.cpp models locally, and with Anthropic, DeepSeek, Ollama, Mistral and OpenAI models remotely.

item.title: thunder-app/thunder
item.description: An open-source cross-platform Lemmy & PieFed client for iOS and Android

item.title: deltachat/deltachat-android
item.description: Decentralized private messenger with chat-shared tools and games for Android

item.title: waydroid/waydroid
item.description: Waydroid uses a container-based approach to boot a full Android system on a regular GNU/Linux system like Ubuntu.

item.title: localdesktop/localdesktop.github.io
item.description: Local Desktop helps you run a desktop Linux environment on your Android device.

item.title: nikita36078/J2ME-Loader
item.description: A J2ME emulator for Android.

item.title: aleksey-saenko/MusicRecognizer
item.description: An open-source Android app for music recognition that integrates AudD, ACRCloud, and Shazam to perform song identification.

item.title: google/comprehensive-rust
item.description: This is the Rust course used by the Android team at Google. It provides you the material to quickly teach Rust.

item.title: objectbox/objectbox-dart
item.description: Flutter database for super-fast Dart object persistence

item.title: spieglt/FlyingCarpet
item.description: Cross-platform AirDrop. File transfer between Android, iOS, Linux, macOS, and Windows over ad hoc WiFi. No network infrastructure required, just two devices with WiFi chips (and optionally Bluetooth) in close range.

item.title: Shabinder/SpotiFlyer
item.description: Kotlin Multiplatform Music Downloader, Supports Spotify / Gaana / Youtube Music / Jio Saavn / SoundCloud.

item.title: authpass/authpass
item.description: AuthPass - Password Manager based on Flutter for all platforms. Keepass 2.x (KDBX 3 and KDBX 4) compatible.

item.title: picguard/picguard
item.description: Your pictures, your signature.

item.title: syncthing/syncthing-android
item.description: Wrapper of syncthing for Android.

item.title: SimformSolutionsPvtLtd/chatview
item.description: Highly customisable chat UI with reply and reaction functionality.

item.title: appleboy/gorush
item.description: A push notification server written in Go (Golang).

item.title: flyerhq/flutter_chat_ui
item.description: Free and open-source chat SDK. Build fast, real-time apps and generative AI agents with a high-performance, customizable, cross-platform UI.

item.title: SebastienBtr/Dash-Chat-2
item.description: The most complete Chat UI for flutter. Easy to use, highly customizable and fully featured

item.title: media-kit/media-kit
item.description: A cross-platform video player & audio player for Flutter & Dart.

item.title: caydey/ffshare
item.description: An android app to compress image, video and audio files through ffmpeg before sharing them

item.title: keshav-space/safenotes
item.description: Safe Notes is a security project aimed at providing an encrypted, private note manager that works locally and protects notes from various threat actors.

item.title: sk22/megalodon
item.description: Abandoned. Pink modification of the official Mastodon for Android app

item.title: LemmyNet/jerboa
item.description: A native Android app for Lemmy

item.title: alexmercerind/audire
item.description: Identify music playing around you.

item.title: PrintN/Human-Benchmark
item.description: Human Benchmark is a Flutter app for Android that features many tests to assess your abilities.

item.title: ubuntu-flutter-community/musicpod
item.description: Music, radio, television and podcast player for Ubuntu, MacOs and maybe soon Android

item.title: X1nto/Mauth
item.description: A Material You Two-factor Authentication app

item.title: android-password-store/Android-Password-Store
item.description: Android application compatible with ZX2C4’s Pass command line application

item.title: golang-design/clipboard
item.description: 📋 cross-platform clipboard package that supports accessing text and image in Go (macOS/Linux/Windows/Android/iOS)

item.title: MaikuB/flutter_appauth
item.description: A Flutter wrapper for AppAuth iOS and Android SDKs

item.title: comxd/plasma-kdeconnect-sms
item.description: 📱 💬 Plasmoid for KDE Connect allowing SMS sending from your desktop — KDE Plasma 6

item.title: arran4/send_to_linkwarden
item.description: Mobile version of Linkwarden

item.title: nebomuk/nobleNoteAndroid
item.description: Simple Android app to make and manage notes

item.title: oi-narendra/multiselect-dropdown
item.description: Streamlined Flutter widget for versatile multi-selection with extensive customization.

item.title: arran4/Dimension
item.description: (Beta) Peer-to-peer group chat and file transfer.

item.title: GloDroid/glodroid_manifest
item.description: Android port that aims to bring both user- and developer-friendly experience in using AOSP with a set of single-board computers (SBC), phones and other devices.

item.title: afonsocraposo/buttons_tabbar
item.description: A Flutter package that implements a TabBar where each label is a toggle button.
